name: Influenza (Flu)
precautions: Avoid close contact with sick people

name: Measles
symptoms: Red rash spreading from face downward

name: Epstein-Barr Virus (Mononucleosis)
precautions: Avoid contact sports if spleen enlarged

name: Zika Virus
precautions: Avoid travel to outbreak areas if pregnant

name: Yellow Fever
risk_factors: Travel to endemic areas (Africa, South America)
precautions: Avoid endemic areas if not vaccinated

name: Rubella (German Measles)
precautions: Avoid contact if pregnant and not immune

name: Norovirus
precautions: Avoid food prepared by sick people

name: Hand, Foot, and Mouth Disease
symptoms: Skin rash on hands and feet

name: Shingles (Herpes Zoster)
symptoms: Painful rash on one side of body

name: Lyme Disease
precautions: Check for ticks after outdoor activities

name: Tetanus
precautions: Seek medical care for deep wounds

name: Botulism
precautions: Don't give honey to infants under 1 year

name: Syphilis
risk_factors: Men who have sex with men

name: Giardiasis
precautions: Boil or filter water when camping

name: Toxoplasmosis
precautions: Wash hands after handling raw meat

name: Stroke
symptoms: Sudden numbness or weakness (face, arm, leg)

name: Breast Cancer
symptoms: Change in breast size or shape
